title: Savory Juicy Dutch King Prawn Brunch Mood Crumble
description: A savory and juicy dutch dish featuring king prawns in a sous-vide preparation, served as a brunch item that is also plant-based-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 cups vegan cream cheese or cashew cream (homemade)
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with any plant-based alternative for cheese

instructions: Place the prawns in a sous-vide bag and cook them at 52°C (126°F) for about 1 hour. Pat dry with paper towels.
In a skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped cashews and sauté until golden brown and fragrant, approximately 4-5 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the skillet, stir for 30 seconds and then add lemon juice. Mix well to combine.
Fold in cooked prawns, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using). Stir everything together thoroughly.
Pour in cashew cream or vegan cheese, stirring gently until everything is evenly coated and heated through. Serve warm.
Top with fresh parsley for garnish.
